narrative_constraints.statement: Profiel G-G' in the Carré is a slow-traffic connection (langzaamverkeersverbinding) with a total width of 17.50m, subdivided into two edge strips of 0.75m, two zones of 5.00m, and a central zone of 6.00m. Trees and greenery are shown in the central zone.
